message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{\"[0, 1, 2]\": 1, \"[1, 1, 2]\": 1, \"[0, 2, 3]\": 5, \"[1, 2, 3]\": 2, \"[2, 1, 3]\": 10}","[[[1, 1, 2], \"MANDATORY\"], [[0, 2, 3], 1], [[1, 2, 3], \"PROHIBITED\"]]"],"focus":"Parallel edges across layers, mandatory inclusion forcing exclusion of other-layer parallel edge, and a prohibition forcing alternate connection."},{"input_lines":["{\"[0, 10, 11]\": 7, \"[1, 11, 12]\": 4, \"[0, 12, 13]\": 6, \"[2, 14, 15]\": 3}","[[[1, 13, 14], 2], [[1, 13, 14], \"MANDATORY\"], [[0, 10, 11], 1], [[0, 11, 12], 1]]"],"focus":"New conduit addition to connect previously disconnected components, then make it mandatory; cost updates add alternative links — tests handling of new-edge additions and large node ids."},{"input_lines":["{\"[0, 0, 1]\": 3, \"[1, 1, 2]\": 0, \"[1, 2, 0]\": 2, \"[2, 2, 1]\": 4, \"[0, 1, 2]\": 1}","[[[1, 1, 2], 1], [[2, 1, 2], \"MANDATORY\"], [[0, 1, 2], \"PROHIBITED\"]]"],"focus":"Order-insensitivity and node-order normalization (updates reference reversed node order); zero-cost edge changed, then a reversed-edge is made mandatory and a cheaper edge prohibited to force non-trivial re-selection."}]}
